message:
style(tests/cli_robot): rustfmt multi-line assert_eq + helper call

Cosmetic reformat of state_and_status_report_active_rebuild_pipeline_runtime:
- hold_active_lexical_rebuild_lock call single-lined under the col
  budget.
- inflight_message_bytes / producer_budget_wait_count /
  producer_handoff_wait_count asserts wrapped to the multi-line
  arg form so the indexed as_u64() chain fits inside 100 cols.
No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
